name: formatho-agent-todo
description: Manage tasks, projects, and AI agents in the Formatho Agent Todo platform
author: formatho

enabled.description: Enable the Formatho Agent Todo plugin

serverUrl.description: Your Formatho Agent Todo server URL (e.g., https://todo.example.com or http://localhost:8080)
serverUrl.prompt: Enter your Formatho Agent Todo server URL

apiKey.description: API key for authentication (optional for humans, required for agents)
apiKey.prompt: Enter your API key (optional, press Enter to skip)

autoInstall.description: Automatically install agent-todo CLI if not found

network.description: Access Formatho Agent Todo server at user-specified URL
